prompt: Create a high-impact commercial snack advertisement in a dramatic studio setting. Show a large glossy bag of {argument name="brand name" default="Lay's"} {argument name="product flavor" default="Classic"} potato chips standing upright slightly left of center, photographed at a three-quarter front angle. The bag is bright golden yellow with a realistic crinkled plastic texture, a large red-and-white logo centered near the top, the flavor name printed below, a photo of whole potatoes and several stacked potato chips near the lower front, and small package details including a circular badge near the top right that reads "MADE WITH 3 INGREDIENTS" with tiny lines under it reading "POTATOES", "OIL", "SALT", plus small text near the bottom left reading "POTATO CHIPS". Surround the bag with exactly 11 visible potato chips flying through the air at different depths and angles, some curled and some flat, with crisp texture and golden highlights. Fill the scene with explosive golden crumbs, seasoning dust, and sparkling particles bursting around the package, especially behind it and across the floor. Use a deep black background with warm amber rim lighting, strong contrast, glowing highlights, and cinematic backlit particles. On the right side, add a bold stacked headline in large distressed uppercase sans-serif text reading {argument name="headline text" default="HAPPINESS IN EVERY CRUNCH"}, with "HAPPINESS" and "CRUNCH" in white and "IN EVERY" in vivid golden yellow. Beneath the headline, place a two-line subheading in smaller uppercase text reading {argument name="subheading text" default="SIMPLE INGREDIENTS. IRRESISTIBLE FLAVOR."}, with the first line in white and the second line in yellow. At the bottom right, place a small round brand logo above the tagline {argument name="tagline" default="No Lay's, No Game."}. The composition should feel energetic, premium, messy in a controlled way, and optimized for e-commerce or promotional ad creative, with ultra-sharp product focus, dramatic lighting, floating debris, glossy reflections on the ground, and a polished photorealistic food photography look.
translatedPrompt: 创作一个在戏剧性摄影棚背景下、具有高视觉冲击力的商业零食广告。画面中心偏左处放置一袋巨大的 {argument name="brand name" default="Lay's"} {argument name="product flavor" default="经典原味"} 薯片，采用四分之三正面角度拍摄。包装袋呈明亮的金黄色，具有逼真的褶皱塑料质感，顶部中央印有醒目的红白相间 Logo，下方印有口味名称，包装正面下方展示了整颗土豆和几片堆叠的薯片，右上角有一个圆形徽章，写着“MADE WITH 3 INGREDIENTS”，下方有细小的文字标注“POTATOES”、“OIL”、“SALT”，左下角有小字写着“POTATO CHIPS”。在包装袋周围放置 11 片清晰可见的薯片，它们以不同的深度和角度在空中飞舞，有的卷曲，有的平整，质感酥脆，带有金色的高光。场景中充斥着爆炸般的金色碎屑、调味粉末和闪烁的微粒，在包装袋后方及地面上四散开来。使用深黑色背景，搭配温暖的琥珀色轮廓光，形成强烈的对比，突出光影效果，并呈现电影级的背光微粒感。在右侧，添加醒目的堆叠式大标题，使用粗犷的大写无衬线字体，内容为 {argument name="headline text" default="HAPPINESS IN EVERY CRUNCH"}，其中“HAPPINESS”和“CRUNCH”为白色，“IN EVERY”为鲜艳的金黄色。在标题下方，放置两行较小的全大写副标题，内容为 {argument name="subheading text" default="SIMPLE INGREDIENTS. IRRESISTIBLE FLAVOR."}，第一行为白色，第二行为黄色。在右下角，放置一个圆形小品牌 Logo，上方为标语 {argument name="tagline" default="No Lay's, No Game."}。整体构图应充满活力、高端大气，呈现出一种受控的凌乱感，专为电商或促销广告创意而优化，确保产品焦点极度清晰，光影效果戏剧化，并具备飞溅的碎屑、地面上的光泽反射以及精致的照片级写实美食摄影质感。

breakdown.creativeCore: 电影级薯片广告：一款极具戏剧性的照片级写实零食产品广告，旨在生成充满冲击力的电商或促销视觉效果，包含飞溅的薯片、发光的碎屑以及醒目的营销文案。
breakdown.subject: 产品
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；文字是主视觉
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 产品首图、广告图、电商详情页首屏

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 产品/电商 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, cinematic, premium, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: dramatic lighting, rim light]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
